languages.text: {n}Батошски кивает вам, глядя прямо в глаза:{/n} "Ваша Светлость".
{n}Batoshski nods to you, looking you straight in the eye:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски кивает вам, глядя прямо в глаза:{/n} "Ваша Светлость".

languages.text: バトシュスキーは近くの影から姿を現し、首を硬く振って、あなたの目をじっと見つめながら言った。「貴方様。{name}様。お会いできて嬉しいです」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski emerges from his hiding place in the nearby shadows and nods stiffly, looking you straight in the eye:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. {name}. It is good to see you."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski, doğrudan gözlerinin içine bakarak sana başını sallıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski nods to you, looking you straight in the eye:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski, doğrudan gözlerinin içine bakarak sana başını sallıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基直视着你的眼睛，向你点头致意：{/n}“大人。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski nickt dir zu und sieht dir direkt in die Augen:{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski hoche la tête et vous regarde droit dans les yeux :{/n} « Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski inclina la cabeza sin dejar de mirarte a los ojos.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}».
